message:
fix(messaging): add checkpoint cancellation to kafka, nats, and redis poll loops

All three messaging backends (Kafka consumer, NATS reader, Redis connection)
had poll_fn blocks that could block indefinitely when the Cx was cancelled
because they lacked cooperative cancellation checks.

Added cx.checkpoint().is_err() early-returns in each poll loop so consumers
return Interrupted on cancel instead of hanging until the next message or
timeout arrives. This is the same pattern applied to gen_server in the
ongoing checkpoint migration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
